div.class: boq_dash_header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between px-4 py-3 border-bottom

div.small: Trade-wise vendor summary · margins · project status

div.p: View ratings, margins, trade assignments and PO stats for all vendors

div.div: Click a row to open the BOQ
Click a row to open the Purchase Order

div.class: px-4 pb-2 pt-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between
boq_vendor_totals_bar px-4 pb-3 d-flex flex-wrap gap-3 align-items-center

div.t:
No RFQs linked to BOQs yet.
Open a BOQ, assign trade-level vendors, and click Create RFQ.

div.class: card-header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between p-0 ps-3
d-flex align-items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 border-bottom

t.p: No BOQ lines found for this vendor.

div.div: All items in linked BOQs are assigned to this vendor.

t.div: This vendor is selected at the trade level. All items within each assigned trade will be sent to this vendor when creating RFQs.

div.p: No trade-level assignments found for this vendor.
div.small: Open a BOQ and assign this vendor to a trade tab to see trade assignments here.

div.class: boq_rating_overview d-flex align-items-center gap-4 mb-4 p-3 border rounded

i.t-attf-class: fa fa-2x {{ state.selectedVendor.vendor_rating_count > 0 and star <= Math.round(state.selectedVendor.vendor_rating_avg) ? 'fa-star boq_star_filled' : 'fa-star-o boq_star_empty' }}

div.p: No ratings yet for this vendor.
